Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Navigation Protection Act (certain lakes and rivers in British Columbia)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Navigation Protection Act (certain lakes and rivers in British Columbia)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Navigation Protection Act in order to add certain lakes and rivers in British Columbia to the navigable waters listed in the schedule to that Act.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Part 1 of the schedule to the Navigation Protection Act is amended by adding after item 10 the following, as indicated:

Provision.Text: Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜10.1
Column 1:芒聙聝Skaha Lake
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳25芒聙虏21芒聙鲁 N, 119脗掳35芒聙虏16芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜10.2
Column 1:芒聙聝Tugulnuit Lake
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳11芒聙虏55芒聙鲁 N, 119脗掳32芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜10.3
Column 1:芒聙聝Vaseux Lake
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳16芒聙虏16芒聙鲁 N, 119脗掳31芒聙虏59芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜10.4
Column 1:芒聙聝Osoyoos Lake
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳02芒聙虏40芒聙鲁 N, 119脗掳27芒聙虏30芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways

Section.Text: Part 1 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding after item 14 the following, as indicated:

Provision.Text: Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜14.1
Column 1:芒聙聝Christina Lake
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳07芒聙虏46芒聙鲁 N, 118脗掳15芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways

Section.Text: Part 1 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding after item 16 the following, as indicated:

Provision.Text: Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜16.1
Column 1:芒聙聝Box Lake
Column 2:芒聙聝50脗掳12芒聙虏35芒聙鲁 N, 117脗掳43芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜16.2
Column 1:芒聙聝Summit Lake
Column 2:芒聙聝50脗掳09芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 N, 117脗掳38芒聙虏19芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜16.3
Column 1:芒聙聝Slocan Lake
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳53芒聙虏15芒聙鲁 N, 117脗掳25芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding after item 8 the following, as indicated:

Provision.Text: Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜8.1
Column 1:芒聙聝Okanagan River
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳05芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 N, 119脗掳31芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝50脗掳20芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 N, 119脗掳18芒聙虏51芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣4:芒聙聝From Okanagan Lake to the Canada芒聙聯U.S. border
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜8.2
Column 1:芒聙聝Granby River
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳01芒聙虏52芒聙鲁 N, 118脗掳25芒聙虏58芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝49脗掳54芒聙虏08芒聙鲁 N, 118脗掳22芒聙虏12芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣4:芒聙聝From its headwaters in Granby Provincial Park to the Kettle River
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜8.3
Column 1:芒聙聝Christina Creek
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳01芒聙虏48芒聙鲁 N, 118脗掳12芒聙虏06芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝49脗掳02芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 N, 118脗掳12芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣4:芒聙聝From Christina Lake to the Kettle River
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜8.4
Column 1:芒聙聝Kettle River
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳00芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 N, 118脗掳12芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝50脗掳06芒聙虏37芒聙鲁 N, 118脗掳17芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣4:芒聙聝From Holmes Lake to the Canada芒聙聯U.S. border

Section.Text: The portion of item 10 of Part 2 of the schedule to the Act in columns 3 and 4 is replaced by the following:

Provision.Text: Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝50脗掳18芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 N, 115脗掳51芒聙虏08芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣4:芒聙聝From Columbia Lake to the Canada芒聙聯U.S. border

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding after item 10 the following, as indicated:

Provision.Text: Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜10.1
Column 1:芒聙聝Pend d芒聙聶Oreille River
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳00芒聙虏14芒聙鲁 N, 117脗掳37芒聙虏06芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝49脗掳00芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 N, 117脗掳21芒聙虏12芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣4:芒聙聝From the Canada芒聙聯U.S. border to the Columbia River
Item:芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聝芒聙聜10.2
Column 1:芒聙聝Slocan River
Column 2:芒聙聝49脗掳25芒聙虏08芒聙鲁 N, 117脗掳31芒聙虏28芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣3:芒聙聝49脗掳46芒聙虏03芒聙鲁 N, 117脗掳28芒聙虏28芒聙鲁 W
Column芒聙聣4:芒聙聝From Slocan Lake to the Kootenay River
